edition.dagbeeld: De spanning in de Straat van Hormuz escaleert verder: Iran valt tankers aan en richt zich op buurlanden Bahrein en Jordanië, terwijl Trump dreigt met tolheffing op scheepvaart en een blokkade van Iraanse havens. Ondertussen houdt de digitale veiligheid van Nederland de gemoederen bezig, met het DigiD-verbod dat standhoudt, en waarschuwt de NAVO voor Russische camerahacks gericht op militaire logistiek.

article.title: Iran targets Bahrain and Jordan in retaliation as US strikes continue
article.summary: US hits targets in port cities of Bushehr and Bandar Abbas while Iran attacks two tankers in strait of Hormuz

opening.note: Iran valt tankers én bondgenoten Bahrein en Jordanië aan; conflict verbreedt zich.
opening.label: breaking

article.title: NATO logistics, Ukrainian troops are top subjects of Russian camera hacks, advisory says
article.summary: Dutch intelligence officials report that at least one Russian agency is compromising internet-connected cameras across Europe to spy on military logistics and Ukrainian personnel.

front.note: Russische hackers onderscheppen camera's in Europa om NAVO-logistiek te bespioneren.

article.title: Ukraine PM Yulia Svyrydenko steps down as Zelensky orders reshuffle
article.summary: After one year in the role, Ukraine's Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko resigned on July 14, 2026, as part of a government reshuffle ordered by President Volodymyr Zelensky, who has not yet announced her replacement.

items.title: Hungarian parliament votes to remove president in controversial constitutional reform
